title: Gurus Prescribed These Health Care Stocks in the 3rd Quarter
text: Amid rising concerns about the state of the global economy, rising inflation, central bank interest rate hikes and increased Covid-19 restrictions in China, marked indexes were mixed on Wednesday morning.

title: These Are the Five Best and Worst Performing Healthcare Stocks in October 2022
text: The healthcare sector has gained momentum following the COVID-19 pandemic. Several companies gained early regulatory approval for developing COVID-19 drugs and distributing vaccines.

title: Edwards Life Sciences Stock Disaster Could Be Your Bounty
text: Heart disease equipment maker Edwards Life Sciences (NYSE: EW) stock has fallen (-46%) on the year after a disastrous reaction to its Q3 2022 earnings report.
